title: Allogene Therapeutics Reports First Quarter 2026 Financial Results and Business Update
text: Allogene Q1 2026 Earnings Press Release. Reported May 13, 2026. ALPHA3 Trial (Cema-Cel): 58.3% (7/12) achieved MRD clearance vs 16.7% (2/12) observation. 41.6% absolute difference. Safety favorable. CEO: encouraged by interim results highlighting cema-cel's potential for meaningful MRD clearance with favorable outpatient safety profile. ALLO-329 Progress: Phase 1 RESOLUTION trial ongoing. Nine patients treated across dose levels. Early signs of clinical activity and favorable tolerability at relatively low doses vs competing programs. Financial: Q1 ended with $266.9M cash/investments. April offering raised $200.4M gross. Runway into Q1 2029. 2026 Guidance: Operating cash expense increased from $150M to $165M.
